core_mechanism: recasting an exact-reconstruction task as a per-candidate binary hypothesis test (deciding 'was this specific item sent?' rather than recovering the item), which lets the number of resolvable candidates grow double-exponentially in the resource budget instead of exponentially
brief_reason: The abstract replaces message decoding with the receiver merely deciding whether a particular message was sent, and states this hypothesis-testing reformulation yields double-exponential growth in the number of identifiable messages with blocklength.
